description: A unique identifier for a specific hotel property.
name: property_code

description: The name of the hotel property.
name: property_name

description: The date for which the hotel stay information is recorded.
name: stay_date

description: The date when the data snapshot was taken.
name: snapshot_date

description: Information about special events occurring on the stay date.
name: special_events

description: Information about special events occurring on the stay date in the previous year.
name: special_events_ly

description: The number of rooms available for booking.
name: available_rooms

description: The number of rooms available for booking in the previous year.
name: available_rooms_ly

description: The total number of rooms demanded.
name: total_demand_total

description: The actual total number of rooms demanded in the previous year.
name: total_demand_total_ly_actual

description: The number of rooms demanded by groups.
name: total_demand_group

description: The actual number of rooms demanded by groups in the previous year.
name: total_demand_group_ly_actual

description: The number of rooms demanded by transient guests.
name: total_demand_transient

description: The actual number of rooms demanded by transient guests in the previous year.
name: total_demand_transient_ly_actual

description: The last room value, representing a pricing metric.
name: lrv

description: The percentage of rooms that were washed (canceled or no-show).
name: wash_pct

description: The actual percentage of rooms that were washed in the previous year.
name: wash_pct_ly_actual

description: The best available rate price for a room.
name: bar_price
